overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player traverses elevated walkways, descends to busy streets with heavy traffic and holographic advertisements, and explores covered pedestrian corridors with vibrant teal and pink neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with food vendor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated walkway overlooking the city street below

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing beside illuminated cart with umbrella

entered.detail: illuminated food cart with yellow umbrella and neon lighting
continuous yellow railing with integrated pink neon strip lighting
dense cluster of skyscrapers with multiple holographic billboards and neon signs
overhead concrete structure providing partial cover

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway at night, illuminated by vibrant neon lights. A food vendor stands beside their illuminated cart on the left, while yellow safety railings with pink neon strips line the path. The camera moves forward overlooking a dense urban skyline filled with holographic advertisements.

events.description: entering enclosed stairwell descending from elevated walkway to street level
exiting stairwell onto busy street level with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: descending concrete stairs while maintaining forward momentum toward street level

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal edges descending to street level
tall building with prominent SECTOR signage becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a concrete stairwell, descending from the elevated walkway toward street level. The environment transitions from open neon-lit exterior to enclosed artificial lighting. Upon exiting the stairs, the busy street level becomes visible with the SECTOR building prominent on the right and moderate traffic flowing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with holographic advertisements and heavy traffic

events.description: waiting for gap in traffic while vehicles pass through intersection
turning head upward to view large holographic samurai advertisement on building facade

agents.ego_description: navigating across busy street while avoiding vehicles and observing neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through intersection with headlights on
white sedan waiting at traffic light

entered.detail: large green glowing holographic projection of a samurai figure on building facade
tall modern street lamps with bright white illumination

segments.scene_description: At street level in a wide urban canyon, the camera navigates through heavy traffic with dense vehicle presence. The SECTOR building dominates the right side while a massive green holographic samurai advertisement glows on a distant skyscraper. Pedestrians scatter across the sidewalks and crosswalks amid the flowing traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell ascending to covered pedestrian walkway

events.description: entering stairwell on opposite side of street to ascend to covered walkway
transitioning from warm street lighting to cool teal neon lighting of covered walkway

agents.ego_description: ascending concrete stairs toward covered walkway entrance while passing descending pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket descending the stairs in opposite direction

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings ascending to upper level
low concrete ceiling with integrated linear lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The camera enters another stairwell on the far side of the street, ascending away from the busy traffic below. The environment shifts from the open neon-lit street to an enclosed concrete stairwell. Upon reaching the top, the lighting transitions to cool teal tones as the covered pedestrian walkway begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian mall with illuminated benches and neon shop signs

events.description: turning slightly right to follow curvature of covered walkway corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor passing other pedestrians and illuminated shop fronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in same direction
group of pedestrians browsing near shop entrance with neon signage

entered.detail: futuristic benches with glowing teal light strips underneath
various shop signs with cyan and pink neon lettering including TRANCE sign
illuminated vending machine with advertisements on side

segments.scene_description: Inside the covered pedestrian walkway, the scene is bathed in teal and cyan neon light reflecting off polished floors. Illuminated benches line the right side while various shops with neon signage occupy the left. Moderate crowds of pedestrians walk in the same direction through the corridor, which curves gently through the urban structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered walkway with open sections overlooking street traffic

events.description: reaching open overlook section providing view of street traffic below

agents.ego_description: continuing through covered walkway while briefly observing street activity through overlook openings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink jacket walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: open section of walkway revealing street level with moving traffic below

segments.scene_description: The covered walkway continues with sections opening to overlook the busy street below, revealing moving traffic and the urban canyon. The teal neon lighting persists throughout the corridor, with illuminated benches now visible on the left side. The camera maintains a steady walking pace through the moderate pedestrian traffic in this elevated pedestrian infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated neon walkway down into a bustling urban canyon and back up into a stylized pedestrian corridor. It begins on a high walkway beside a food vendor and pink neon railings, moving forward toward a skyline of holographic advertisements before descending through a concrete stairwell. As the camera reaches street level, the environment opens into a wide urban canyon dominated by the SECTOR building and a massive green holographic samurai, navigating through heavy traffic and crowds of pedestrians. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends another stairwell, leaving the noisy street behind and transitioning into a covered walkway bathed in cool teal and cyan neon light. Finally, the camera glides through this polished corridor past illuminated benches and shops, occasionally glancing over the edge to reveal the glowing city traffic below.
